examples: He is the dwarf cleric of Mithril Hall.
Crouching low, the Mithril agent leveled the six-month-old a serious stare.
Mithril Spurs and a the riding enchantment for gloves are gear enhancements that improve mounted speed. The quest reward Carrot on a Stick grants the same benefit.
Mithril partly owns German solar panel manufacturer Solan, which also holds a stake in Solar Sailor.
In the open world, every character has access to the main inventory, which include the forged mithril items.
